senses.definition_en: to grow or change gradually into a more advanced, larger, or mature state

examples.en: The town has developed rapidly over the last decade.
examples.fa: این شهر در دهه گذشته به‌سرعت توسعه یافته است.

senses.definition_en: to create or produce something, such as a product, plan, or idea, over time

examples.en: Our team is developing a new mobile application.
examples.fa: تیم ما در حال توسعه یک اپلیکیشن موبایل جدید است.

notes: "Developing country" (کشور در حال توسعه) is a very common fixed phrase built from this word.
